title: hdf5-neuro-ml: A standard for EEG time-series data in HDF5 optimized for machine learning (Profile 1.2)
description: Open publication package for the hdf5-neuro-ml EEG profile (format_version 1.2). Includes the normative specification, JSON schema, example files, implementation profile description, and citation metadata. The standard defines a structure for storing EEG time-series data in HDF5 optimized for efficient analysis and machine learning workflows.
